about.intro.p1: I'm a Full Stack Developer passionate about creating solutions that make a positive impact. I specialize in web development, scalable APIs, and cybersecurity.
about.intro.p2: I love projects that involve challenges that push me out of my comfort zone, lead me to learn new ways to solve problems, and master new tools.
